tool_args.label: New York City Transit Key Performance Metrics - April 2026

payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: This performance metrics document was prepared for the New York City Transit & Bus Committee meeting.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Demetrius Crichlow, President of New York City Transit

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area
Civilian fare enforcement agents of NYCT who issue summonses to riders who board buses without paying their fares
Primary policing agency in the NYCT subway system
MTA paratransit service

tool_args.label: New York City Transit & Bus Committee

payload.entity_name: New York City Transit & Bus Committee
payload.description: The committee for which this performance metrics document was prepared

tool_args.label: ACE activation on B15 and M31 - 60-day warning period

payload.description: ACE (Automated Camera Enforcement) began its 60-day warning period on the B15 and M31 routes

tool_args.label: New bus simulators come online at Zerega and Spring Creek

payload.description: New state-of-the-art bus simulators came online at Zerega and Spring Creek facilities
The Spring 'Customers Count' survey released in early April to align rider priorities with service improvements
TransitTalk hosted at 125th St on the A C B D lines this month

tool_args.label: Autism Acceptance Month event at Grand Central

payload.description: MTA hosted a group of children at Grand Central to check out a vintage bus and explore a Metro-North train simulator for Autism Acceptance Month

tool_args.label: New redundant elevator opened at 59 St-Columbus Circle

payload.description: New redundant elevator opened at 59 St-Columbus Circle station serving southbound ABCD lines and northbound 1 line, built by developer Global Holdings with no cost to MTA

tool_args.label: Bus Operator Simulators at Zerega and Spring Creek

payload.description: Four new state-of-the-art bus simulators deployed at Zerega and Spring Creek facilities providing immersive 4K environments with operator cabins that replicate diesel, hybrid, electric, and articulated fleets

tool_args.label: Elevator and Escalator Replacements Across 11 Subway Lines

payload.description: Upgraded elevators and escalators put into service across 11 subway lines including at 14 St-Union Sq (L N Q R W), DeKalb Av (B C R), 145 St (A B C D), Lexington Av-63 St (F M Q), and 161 St-Yankee Stadium (B D)

payload.description: Record highest monthly total ever

payload.raw_value_text: increased 12.7% year over year to more than 1.4 million
More than 1,700 buses are now ACE equipped
benefiting over one million customers on an average weekday

payload.description: in addition to mileage with a +1.2% increase

tool_args.label: Paratransit Primary Carrier On-Time Performance March 2026

payload.raw_value_text: more than 93% of trips within the 30-minute pickup window

payload.claim_text: fare evasion has dropped by 30% thanks to successful compliance efforts including hardening fare arrays with fins and sleeves, installing delayed egress at emergency exit gates, investing in modern fare gates, expanding Student OMNY cards, and encouraging qualified riders to utilize the Fair Fare Program

payload.raw_value_text: 70% of subway customers were satisfied with their last subway trip
68% of bus customers were satisfied with their last trip
80% of Access-A-Ride customers were satisfied with their last trip
68% of subway customers feel safe in the subway system

payload.description: ACE program that improves bus speeds, reduces collisions and emissions, and keeps bus lanes and stops clear

Mobile tool used by EAGLE Team personnel to verify that customers have paid their fare by OMNY taps on buses. Designed strictly for validation purposes, does not accept payments or store financial/personal information.
